title: EasyReplant
description: Easy Replant allows you to harvest and replant crops instantly with a simple right-click. It automatically places a new seed from your inventory, keeping your farming fast and efficient.
body:
# **Easy Replant**
**Easy Replant** is a simple utility mod that tackles one of the most repetitive chores in Minecraft: harvesting and replanting crops.

When you are managing a large farm, the constant cycle of breaking a block and then manually placing a seed back down is time-consuming. This mod streamlines that process into a single, fluid action.

With Easy Replant installed, right-clicking a fully grown crop will instantly harvest it and place a new seed in its place. The mod automatically checks your inventory for the correct seed type, so as long as you have the supplies, your farm stays perfectly planted without the extra clicks.

It works with all standard vanilla crops, including wheat, carrots, potatoes, and beetroots.

### **Main features:**

**Efficient farming:** Harvests and replants in one move, keeping your farm beds organized and full.

**Smart logic:** Only works on mature crops, so you won't accidentally reset a plant that is still growing.

**Simple mechanic:** No menus or configuration required. If you have the seeds in your inventory, it just works.

**Server friendly:** This mod is server-side compatible. If you install it on a server, players using a standard vanilla setup can still use the feature without needing the mod themselves.

**Performance:** Tiny footprint with zero impact on your frame rate or loading times.

_**Installation and compatibility:**_ Built for Fabric Loader and compatible with Minecraft 1.21-1.21.8. Drop the jar into your mods folder and you are ready to farm.
